nav_browser_summary: Extension, native host, and capture health.
nav_conversion_summary: Safe FFmpeg remuxing, transcoding, MP3 extraction, and queued post-download jobs.
nav_diagnostics_summary: Startup, runtime, browser, and engine diagnostics.
nav_downloads_summary: Batch downloads, request metadata, live progress, and history.
nav_media_summary: HLS, DASH, yt-dlp discovery, formats, subtitles, and live capture.
nav_queues_summary: Queue definitions, concurrency, and per-queue bandwidth policies.
nav_scheduler_summary: Time windows for unattended queue runs.
nav_settings_summary: Folders, limits, clipboard monitoring, and behavior.
operation_settings_saved: Settings saved. Language and accessibility changes are active now; network and segmentation policy changes apply after restart.
picker_history_import: Choose XDM download list or plain URL list
picker_settings_import: Choose modern or legacy XDM settings
settings_validation_aria2_endpoint: Enter a valid HTTP or HTTPS aria2 RPC endpoint.
settings_validation_aria2_executable: Choose an aria2 executable when managed-process mode is enabled.
settings_validation_connections: Maximum connections must be greater than or equal to default connections, and both values must be at least 1.
settings_validation_pac_url: Enter a valid HTTP, HTTPS, or file URL for the proxy auto-configuration script.
settings_validation_proxy_host: Enter a proxy host when manual proxy mode is selected.
ui_allow_replacing_an_existing_destinati: Allow replacing an existing destination file
ui_announce_operation_status_changes_to_: Announce operation status changes to screen readers
ui_aria2_additional_arguments: Additional aria2c arguments (one complete argument per line)
ui_aria2_security_note: Managed mode binds RPC to loopback only and uses an authenticated secret. Remote endpoints require HTTPS and an RPC secret.
ui_aria2_url_or_magnet: HTTP, HTTPS, FTP, SFTP, or magnet URI
ui_authenticated_loopback_capture_plus_d: Authenticated loopback capture plus direct, HLS, and DASH media probing.
ui_automatically_add_links_captured_from: Automatically add links captured from clipboard
ui_browser_extensions_use_the_versioned_: Browser extensions use the versioned native-messaging protocol. The host authenticates a per-connection session, validates capture rules and metadata, then waits for XDM to queue the download before acknowledging browser cancellation.
ui_browser_security_description: XDM uses a versioned native-messaging handshake, authenticated loopback transport, per-site capture rules, and optional permissions for sensitive request metadata.
ui_chromium_extension_id_s_comma_separat: Chromium extension ID(s), comma-separated; Firefox is automatic
ui_commands_are_launched_directly_withou: Commands are launched directly without a shell. Shutdown, sleep, hibernate and logout are enabled only when a compatible platform command is present.
ui_conversions_run_one_at_a_time_cancell: Conversions run one at a time. Cancellation terminates the FFmpeg process tree, removes only the private temporary output, and leaves the source untouched.
ui_download_list_json_or_plain_url_list_: Download-list JSON or plain URL-list path
ui_expected_checksum_hint: Paste a SHA-256 or SHA-512 hexadecimal checksum
ui_extension_permissions_hint: Cookies, request bodies, and request headers are read only after the user grants optional enhanced access in the extension popup. URL-only takeover remains available without it.
ui_headers_one_per_line_name_value: Headers, one per line: Name: value
ui_hls_dash_direct_media_or_a_page_suppo: HLS, DASH, direct media, or a page supported by yt-dlp
ui_include_proxy_and_server_passwords_in: Include proxy and server passwords in export
ui_integrated_proxy_authentication_note: System and integrated authentication use the signed-in operating-system credentials for ISA, NTLM, and Kerberos proxy negotiation.
ui_language_right_to_left_layout_contras: Language, right-to-left layout, contrast, and scaling update immediately after saving. Shortcuts: Ctrl+N new download, Ctrl+F search, Ctrl+1 through Ctrl+8 sections, Ctrl+P pause, Ctrl+R resume, Escape cancel.
ui_launch_with_safe_mode_to_skip_browser: Launch with --safe-mode to skip browser and scheduler startup, or --reset-window-state to discard stored window placement.
ui_legacy_import_recognizes_json_java_pr: Legacy import recognizes JSON, Java properties, and XML files. Modern exports redact passwords unless explicitly included.
ui_loading_downloads_hint: XDM is connecting to the download engine and restoring the current session.
ui_mirror_urls_hint: One alternate HTTP, HTTPS, FTP, or FTPS URL per line
ui_network_handler_proxy_retry_and_segme: Network handler, proxy, retry, and segment settings apply to new processes after restart. Per-download connection counts use the saved default immediately.
ui_no_downloads_yet_hint: Add one or more links above, or enable clipboard monitoring to capture supported URLs.
ui_no_matching_downloads_hint: Try a different search term or reset the status filter.
ui_notify_when_update_staged: Notify me when a verified package is staged
ui_one_argument_per_line_use_file_where_: One argument per line; use {file} where the file path belongs
ui_overwrite_an_existing_destination_onl: Overwrite an existing destination only after conversion succeeds
ui_preset_ids_select_fixed_argument_temp: Preset IDs select fixed argument templates. XDM never executes user-provided commands or invokes a shell.
ui_proxy_bypass_patterns_one_per_line: Proxy bypass patterns, one per line
ui_queue_dependencies_hint: Starting a queue also requests its prerequisites. The queue waits until every dependency finishes; successful-only mode also blocks when a dependency fails or is cancelled.
ui_queues_execute_independently_global_a: Queues can run together while global, profile, per-host, and per-queue limits coordinate their bandwidth and concurrency.
ui_recovery_unclean_no_damage: The previous session ended unexpectedly, but no damaged transfer state was found.
ui_release_security_note: Packages are verified with SHA-256 and SHA-512 when published, then accompanied by a receipt and rollback transaction.
ui_remember_the_last_request_metadata_in: Remember the last request metadata in the download dialog
ui_retention_removes_only_history_entrie: Retention removes only history entries. Downloaded files are never deleted automatically.
ui_scan_files_completed_by_scheduled_run: Scan files completed by scheduled runs
ui_search_filename_url_destination_or_qu: Search filename, URL, destination, or queue
ui_select_download_for_details: Select a download to see details
ui_select_download_for_details_hint: The details pane shows progress, errors, source actions, and the event timeline.
ui_selected_subtitles_are_saved_as_langu: Selected subtitles are saved as language-labelled sidecar files. Separate audio/video representations are stream-copied with FFmpeg.
ui_settings_file_or_legacy_settings_dire: Settings file or legacy settings directory
ui_settings_save_hint: Save to apply the settings shown in every category.
ui_settings_validation_hint: Correct the highlighted configuration before saving.
ui_smart_transfer_policy_hint: Profiles dynamically constrain concurrent downloads, concurrent downloads per host, and each transfer's speed ceiling. Environment rules can pause transfers or select a stricter profile.
ui_verified_update_security_note: Packages use trusted HTTPS release hosts, declared sizes, SHA-256, optional SHA-512, SBOM/provenance links, and durable rollback transaction metadata.
ui_allow_native_fallback: Fall back to the native backend when aria2 cannot safely take ownership
ui_enable_automatic_backend_selection: Route suitable downloads to aria2 automatically
ui_aria2_adopt_tasks: Adopt matching aria2 tasks after restart
ui_backend_ownership_note: XDM assigns exactly one backend to each download. Destination collisions block aria2 ownership, and fallback occurs only before a task ID has been established.
ui_media_detection_inbox_hint: Browser detections and manual discoveries are grouped here instead of interrupting your current task.
ui_media_inbox_empty: No media has been detected yet.
ui_media_inbox_empty_hint: Paste a media URL above or use the browser extension on a video page.
ui_media_live_safety_hint: Recording stops when either the duration or size limit is reached. Checkpoints remain available after cancellation.
ui_media_no_selection: Select an item from the detection inbox to inspect its streams.
ui_media_no_selection_hint: New browser detections appear here without changing pages or opening popups.
nav_recovery_summary: Review interrupted transfers and durable partial artifacts before resuming them.
